tasks.subject: Task 0: Vendor qrcode lib + ui-qr.js module + 7 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the qrcode-generator vendored lib + thin ui-qr.js wrapper with full unit test coverage. No DOM integration yet — tests synthesize mount elements via document.createElement.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/lib/qrcode.js (vendored from npm: qrcode-generator@1.4.4)
- Create: public/js/ui/ui-qr.js (~35 LOC)
- Create: client-tests/render-qr.test.js (~140 LOC, 7 tests)
- Modify: client-tests/fixtures.js (add loadVendoredQrLib helper + export)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- qrcode.js vendored verbatim from qrcode-generator@1.4.4 npm
- loadVendoredQrLib() makes window.qrcode a function in jsdom
- renderQR(el, url) mounts <svg> inside el
- el.dataset.qrUrl equals encoded URL
- Memo: renderQR with same URL twice does NOT replace SVG node
- Different URL DOES replace SVG node
- clearQR empties el + removes dataset.qrUrl
- Silent no-op when window.qrcode missing
- 7 tests in render-qr.test.js, all green
- Pre-existing 561 tests stay green → 568 total

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/render-qr.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent` → 7+ green, suite 568 total.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/lib/qrcode.js", "public/js/ui/ui-qr.js", "client-tests/render-qr.test.js", "client-tests/fixtures.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/render-qr.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["qrcode.js vendored verbatim from npm", "loadVendoredQrLib exposes window.qrcode in jsdom", "renderQR mounts SVG + sets dataset.qrUrl", "Memo: same URL skips re-render (node identity preserved)", "Different URL replaces SVG node", "clearQR empties + removes dataset.qrUrl", "Silent no-op when window.qrcode missing", "7 tests green; suite 568 total"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: DOM additions + makeJoinUrl extraction + render wiring + 2 integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire renderQR into renderLobby + renderTeamScreen, add .lobby-qr divs to both lobby panels, extract makeJoinUrl() helper, prove integration with 2 new tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/index.html (3 inserts: <script> + 2 .lobby-qr divs)
- Modify: public/js/app.js (export makeJoinUrl; replace L122 + L395 inline)
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-render.js (import + call in renderLobby ~L155 and renderTeamScreen ~L396)
- Modify: client-tests/render-qr.test.js (add 1 integration test for #waiting-room-qr)
- Modify: client-tests/render-team-screen.test.js (APPEND 1 integration test for #team-screen-qr — additive only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- <script src="/js/lib/qrcode.js"> present in index.html before module script (~L806)
- #waiting-room .lobby-head has <div class="lobby-qr" id="waiting-room-qr"> between .head-title and .public-toggle
- #team-screen .lobby-head has <div class="lobby-qr" id="team-screen-qr"> as 2nd child
- app.js exports makeJoinUrl(code); L122 + L395 use it; output byte-identical
- ui-render.js imports renderQR + makeJoinUrl; calls in both render paths when state.id present
- 1 integration test in render-qr.test.js: renderLobby paints SVG in #waiting-room-qr
- 1 integration test in render-team-screen.test.js: renderTeamScreen paints SVG in #team-screen-qr
- SACROSANCT tests stay byte-identical and green: render-lobby.test.js, red-carpet*.test.js, seat-builder.test.js, all 12 existing tests in render-team-screen.test.js
- Suite: 570 green (561 + 9)

**Verify:** `npm test --silent` → 570 green. `git diff client-tests/render-lobby.test.js client-tests/red-carpet*.test.js client-tests/seat-builder.test.js` → empty.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/index.html", "public/js/app.js", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "client-tests/render-qr.test.js", "client-tests/render-team-screen.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["<script src=/js/lib/qrcode.js> before module script", "#waiting-room .lobby-head: .lobby-qr#waiting-room-qr between .head-title and .public-toggle", "#team-screen .lobby-head: .lobby-qr#team-screen-qr as 2nd child", "app.js exports makeJoinUrl; L122+L395 use it byte-identically", "ui-render.js calls renderQR(mount, makeJoinUrl(state.id)) in both render paths", "2 new integration tests green", "Sacrosanct tests stay byte-identical and green", "Suite 570 total"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CSS append — .lobby-qr tile + responsive (zero deletions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visual styling for the .lobby-qr tile. Append-only — zero edits to pre-existing rules.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (append "Phase 7.8c" section at END of file, ~55 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New "Phase 7.8c — QR Scan-to-Join" section appended with banner comment
- .lobby-qr: width:140px, white background, flex column layout
- .lobby-qr-svg + .lobby-qr-caption rules present
- @media (max-width: 999px) shrinks to 110px
- @media (max-width: 639px) sets display:none
- NO edits to pre-existing rules — `git diff --stat` shows insertions only, ZERO deletions
- No new color tokens (--radius-md and --bg-base are existing)
- Suite stays at 570 green

**Verify:** `npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` → 570 green; insertions > 0, deletions == 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase 7.8c banner section appended at end", ".lobby-qr rule: width 140px, white bg, flex column", ".lobby-qr-svg + .lobby-qr-caption rules present", "@media (max-width: 999px) shrinks to 110px", "@media (max-width: 639px) display:none", "Zero edits to pre-existing rules (git diff insertions only)", "No new color tokens", "Suite stays 570 green"]}
```
